creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Yeah, this comes up almost every time an update is created.
No, it's not even clear when they create releases, they simply show up on the github releases timeline and they include a list of fixes there, but no changelog or anything.
Only thing I can include is 'show all releases starting at <last port version>' but that will give you like 6 pages in github releases overview.
